evidence_confidence: verified | corroborated | unverified | anecdotal | disputed | unknown | not applicable

source_records.source_type: linked-observation | linked-failure-mode | news-report | official-source | social-platform-observation | platform-behaviour-observation | third-party-report | research-source | standards-source | repository-source | repository-observation | linked-proposal | governance-note | deep-research-agent | other
source_records.source_url_status: available | recovered | partial | unavailable | archived | unknown | not applicable | missing_url_requires_research

comparative_vendor_notes.OpenAI: Describe OpenAI-specific evidence in source_records and deployment_context.
comparative_vendor_notes.Anthropic: Describe Anthropic-specific evidence in source_records and deployment_context.

system_context.interface_surface: Multiple evidenced access surfaces; specify details in source_records and deployment_context.
system_context.model_or_product: Multiple products or services across evidenced vendors; use source_records for specifics.
system_context.deployment_context: Multi-vendor deployment context; preserve product and surface details in descriptive fields and source-level metadata.

cam_internal.routing_note: FM routing may use affected_* fields because the record contains triage-relevant failure classification.

ecosystem_status.basis: State the evidence supporting the current external ecosystem state.

repair_status.verification_note: State what has and has not been verified.

corpus_coverage.classification: implemented-repair | retrospective-coverage | partial-coverage | uncovered | verification-pending | not-applicable
